prompt_text:
Consider the following ethical dilemma:

The group of friends often go out drinking on the weekends. One of their friends has recently started attending Alcoholics Anonymous, but they still want to include him in their outings. Should they continue inviting him to their drinking outings, potentially triggering a relapse, or exclude him and risk isolating him from the group?

Analyze this dilemma thoroughly, considering all perspectives and ethical principles at stake.
